rows.text::eng: Welcome to @global.app_name! It is so good to have you. One small tip can make family life easier — tap here to start your first lesson.

rows.title::eng: A better family life starts with you
rows.text::eng: Welcome to @global.app_name. Just 1 minute of learning today can make a real difference. Tap here to find out more.
Well done! You finished your first skill. Tap here to keep going.

rows.title::eng: Keep going — you started something great
rows.text::eng: @fields.user_name, you started something great. Tap here to keep going.

rows.title::eng: Pick up where you left off
rows.text::eng: @fields.user_name, your lesson is still waiting. A few more minutes and you'll be done — tap here to finish.
Ready to take 5 minutes for your family? @global.app_name is here to help. Tap to jump back in.

rows.title::eng: A small step for a better family life
rows.text::eng: Spending just 1 minute learning about parenting makes a world of difference. Tap here to keep going.
